title: Section 15
content: 1[15. Chairman of Board.--(1) The Small Industries Bank shall, in consultation with the State Government nominate a director as a Chairman of the Board for such period not exceeding three years and on such terms and conditions as the Small Industries Bank may specify: Provided that the Chairman shall not be a whole-time director unless he is also appointed to function as the managing director: Provided further that the Chairman shall so long as he remains a director be eligible for re-appointment as Chairman. (2) The Chairman shall preside over the meetings of the Board and the general meetings of the Financial Corporation.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 12, ibid., for section 15 (w.e.f. 5-9-2000).
